title: work-at Facebook Content Dashboard Session Surface
description: Fast session-level health profile for the Facebook content dashboard UI package plus the worker quick-tunnel session generator that serves it.

checks.title: work-at target is reachable
checks.repairHint: Restore worker connectivity or re-register the Facebook UI target before working in this session surface.

checks.title: Registered Facebook UI path exists
checks.repairHint: Restore or re-register the Facebook UI package path so the expected session surface exists on the worker.

checks.title: Facebook UI package.json exists
checks.repairHint: Restore `package.json` for the Facebook UI package before editing or building it.

checks.title: Feature Agentish blueprint exists
checks.repairHint: Restore the feature Agentish blueprint and use it as the primary design source instead of ad hoc package docs.

checks.title: Feature Agentish blueprint-state exists
checks.repairHint: Restore the feature Agentish blueprint-state so current implementation reality is tracked alongside the blueprint.

checks.title: Shared dashboard blueprint exists
checks.repairHint: Restore the shared dashboard blueprint so feature work can be aligned with the broader dashboard plugin contract.

checks.title: Projects dashboard blueprint exists
checks.repairHint: Restore the Projects dashboard blueprint so feature work can inherit the correct project-level workflow rules.

checks.title: Feature Agentish blueprint was maintained recently
checks.repairHint: Review and refresh the feature Agentish blueprint if it has gone stale relative to current dashboard-plugin work.

checks.title: Feature Agentish blueprint-state was maintained recently
checks.repairHint: Refresh the feature blueprint-state if it has not been updated recently to reflect current implementation reality.

checks.title: Blueprint-state is not older than the UI screen implementation
checks.repairHint: Update the feature blueprint-state when the main Facebook dashboard UI screen changes so the documented current reality stays aligned.

checks.title: Blueprint-state is not older than the server plugin implementation
checks.repairHint: Update the feature blueprint-state when the Facebook dashboard server plugin changes so the documented current reality stays aligned.

checks.title: Facebook dashboard plugin entry exists
checks.repairHint: Restore `dashboard-plugin.ts` so the Facebook UI package still exports the expected dashboard plugin entrypoint.

checks.title: Node is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install Node on the worker before running Facebook UI scripts.

checks.title: Bun is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install Bun on the worker before running Facebook UI scripts.

checks.title: rg is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install ripgrep on the worker so agents can search the Facebook UI package quickly.

checks.title: apply_patch is available on target
checks.repairHint: Expose apply_patch on the worker before blueprint or UI rewrites so the agent can make structured file edits there instead of giant inline shell rewrites.
repairCommand: wrapper_dir=/home/ec2-user/.local/bin; real_apply_patch=$(find /home/ec2-user/.nvm/versions/node -path '*/lib/node_modules/@openai/codex/node_modules/@openai/codex-linux-*/vendor/*/codex/codex' 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n 1); test -n "$real_apply_patch" && test -x "$real_apply_patch" && mkdir -p "$wrapper_dir" && ln -sfn "$real_apply_patch" "$wrapper_dir/apply_patch"

checks.title: Dashboard proxy target is reachable
checks.repairHint: Restore worker connectivity for the dashboard proxy surface before attempting plugin-development validation.

checks.title: Worker dashboard proxy is listening on port 3300
checks.repairHint: Start or restart the worker dashboard proxy on port 3300 before issuing or validating dashboard plugin sessions.

checks.title: Worker dashboard frontend is listening on port 5174
checks.repairHint: Start the worker-hosted dashboard frontend on port 5174 before validating the plugin surface.

checks.title: Worker frontend content route responds successfully
checks.repairHint: Repair the worker-hosted dashboard frontend until `/content` loads locally before issuing a tunnel URL.

checks.title: Worker session exchange route fails sanely instead of 500ing
checks.repairHint: Repair the worker dashboard proxy until `/api/session/exchange` returns a structured 4xx auth/input failure for bad input instead of crashing.

checks.title: Worker agent-chat proxy returns a structured auth failure
checks.repairHint: Repair the worker dashboard proxy until `/api/agent-chat/sessions` returns a structured 4xx auth response for a bad bearer token instead of a proxy failure.

checks.title: Worker Facebook dashboard health route responds correctly
checks.repairHint: Repair the worker Facebook dashboard backend until its health route returns a structured success response.

checks.title: Quick tunnel session generator returns a healthy Facebook UI dev URL
checks.repairHint: Repair the dashboard app quick-tunnel generator until it can mint a fresh session URL and the tunneled health endpoint succeeds. The user should be able to get a working authenticated URL immediately.
